'''''Polyhedron'' 157''' is an issue of ''[[Polyhedron]]'' magazine. It appeared as part of '''Dungeon Magazine 98''' in May 2003.

It featured the article "[[I, Jensaarai]]" by [[Rodney Thompson]] with illustrations by [[Ramón Pérez]], and an addon to [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s sourcebook ''[[Starships of the Galaxy]]'' about the [[Starships of the Galaxy: Wayfarer-class Medium Transport|Wayfarer-class medium transport]] by [[Christopher West]] and [[J.D. Wiker]] with illustration by [[Jeffery Carlisle]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

*[[I, Jensaarai]]
*[[Starships of the Galaxy: Wayfarer-class Medium Transport]]
